steps.title: Use the student's goal
steps.content: The student wants a specific example of one of C.M. Forster's most famous works. The notes identify his most famous novels as A Room with a View and Howards End, so the response should name one of those works.

steps.title: Avoid unrelated details
steps.content: A general description of Forster as an acclaimed writer does not provide a specific work. The details about Albergo Empedocle identify his first published fiction or compare its timing, but the notes do not call it one of his most famous works. The statement naming the 1908 novel A Room with a View fits the goal. The answer is C.
